query: SELECT sessionId, playerId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM session_players GROUP BY sessionId, playerId HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25EMAuqsXNnxbn4.root --database UFmRayAUKBpWQhew29rCsn --execute SELECT sessionId, playerId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM session_players GROUP BY sessionId, playerId HAVING cnt > 1;
